title: 303 Fear Faith Revenge
original_title: 303 กลัว กล้า อาฆาต
overview: A group of students hear rumors of a mysterious suicide case of an honor student whose name is engraved in a frame in the middle of the school hall. Out of curiosity, a group of students try to find out the truth. It started with playing ouija board, which has ice, which is also the teacher's daughter. But in the end, the students gradually died one by one.
